case_title: THOMAS IRPAN VS. EVERGREEN BUILDERS GROUP

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT EVERGREEN BUILDERS GROUP

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85.00) SERVED AUG-23-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT EVERGREEN BUILDERS GROUP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-28-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF THOMAS IRPAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EVERGREEN BUILDERS GROUP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ORI PLOPNIK, CEO. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $4260 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-28-2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,100.00 FILED BY IRPAN, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT EVERGREEN BUILDERS GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
